entry.title: Question Certified Application Associate - PP
entry.content:
Which of the following statements is true?

1. A firmed order can be scheduled/rescheduled, but a date fixed order can't be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

2. Both the firmed order and the date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

3. Neither the firmed order nor the date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

4. A firmed order can't be scheduled/rescheduled, but a date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

I've found on the Internet that 1. is True but cannot find the explenation even in TS421/422.

entry.title: Which certification - C_FSM_2211 or C_TS413_2021
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been working in EAM/MRS area for some time now and want to do a Certification to boost my profile. The erstwhile EAM Certification is now discontinued and based on what I have researched, I see two options

C_FSM_2211 - SAP Certified Application Associate - Field Service Management

C_TS413_2021 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4 HANA Asset Management

Which certification will add more value? I know FSM becomes a specific use case and more focus from SAP is towards SSAM (Service and Asset Manager) as it is based on BTP, integrates out of the box with Utilities but still would like to know expert opinion on how popular FSM is really is in real world. SAP acquired Coresystems as the product was in direct competition to SAP's own Asset Manager but there seems to be no real push, will the product be shelved in near future and the efforts and money will be lost for certification which will not see 2025. I am confused. Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Signavio - Exam Retiring
entry.content:
Hello,

I have been working through the SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Signavio Learning Path and was planning to take the certification exam upon completing the learning path. 

The certification site states the exam is retiring on March 11, 2024.  Will there be a new exam to replace it?

Thanks, Jocelyn

entry.title: Which one is best....
entry.content:
Hi family,

I have done my SAP SALES CLOUD 2111 in December 2023.. Application Associate.

Kindly guide me on SAP SALES CLOUD VERSION 2..

What is the industry demand?

In INDIA and Abroad.

Much appreciate your guidance in advance.

🙏🙏

entry.title: Where to start
entry.content: I have been in IT for 25 years. My wife is back in college and is almost finished with supply chain and marketing and she has been using SAP and I’ve had to help her navigate the software and it being my first time and being technologically sound I navigate it decently well. I would like to be a consultant as I’m nearing retirement with my current job with the school system. What route should I take? What certs and beginning learning do u need to go for? Thank you so much

entry.title: Transfer Data from IDoc to Inspection Lot (QM-IM-IL)?
entry.content:
Hi Experts, Can some share how to enable the process Transfer Data from IDoc to Inspection Lot (QM-IM-IL)? Our client is having a requirement that certificate of analysis containing results will be received electronically (like a PDF) & the results from the certificate of analysis needs to be copied/transferred to the inspection lot 01 which will be created upon GR. How can this be enabled? Can some one please advise on the end-to-end flow from a design/solution perspective involving IDOCs?

Thanks a lot!

R

entry.title: SAP RAR certification
entry.content: Is it likely that SAP will come up with a certification for RAR?

entry.title: Which is the new version of C_HCADM_05 certification?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Certification C_HCADM_05 : Provision and administer databases in SAP HANA Cloud
expired on 28th March 2024
What is the new version of this certification?
I see the learning journey of this still existsProvision and Administer Databases in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning

and this learning journey say leads to certification. SAP Certification

 

So which certification does this leads to? because I don't want to spend hours of learning time which leads to nothing.
So, if anyone know the information on this please comment.

Thanks, in advance.
Regards,
Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: SAP C_SECAUTH_20 Certification
entry.content:
Hi all,
 
I wanted to appear for the C_SECAUTH_20 exam. However, I have noticed that it's going to expire by 28th March 2024. Since there is not enough time to prepare for the exam, so I didn't register. Now I am unable to find any other certifications suitable for 'SAP Certified Technology Associate – SAP System
Security and Authorizations' after that. Does anyone know if any other certifications related to this will be available from April 2024?. Thanks in advance.
 
Regards
Kalyani

entry.title: Question regarding Class and Sub Class Constructor
entry.content:
Hello!

Me and my colleagues have been studying for the SAP Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud Certification and we have come across a question where we need some discussion regarding the right answers:

Class super has subclass sub. Which rules are valid for the sub constructor? (2 correct)

1. The method signature can be changed.
2. Events of your own instance cannot be raised before the registration of a handler in super.
3. Import parameters can only be evaluated after calling the constructor of super.
4. The constructor of super must be called before using any components of your own instance.

We know that 4. is true and 3. is wrong, but we are not sure about which one of the others is true. We have read several SAP sources and we need some input from the community.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Print customer specific inspection plan results on Outbound Certificate of Analysis in SAP QM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

When is Outbound Certificate of Analysis usually generated at time of Outbound Delivery creation, at what step?

Also, wanted to check if its possible at before the Outbound Certificate of Analysis is generated, the system should check-

  1. If any customer specific inspection plan exists
  2. See all the inspection characteristics in the customer specific inspection plan & only those MICs that are present in customer specific inspection plan & not all the characteristics in the main inspection plan (since customer specific inspection plans could have different number of MICs)

Can the above be achieved through standard SAP QM or will it entail some enhancement? If enhancement, please suggest any possible BAPI/BADI/User exits etc.

 

Thanks,

RD

Please share your advice

entry.title: Free Sap certification one attempt for student
entry.content:
Hey there, SAP community!

Hope everyone's doing great.

I'm currently a student and interning as a SAP FICO consultant.

I'm eager to learn more and would love to know if there are any opportunities for students to get a free shot at SAP certification,  Could you please advise me on how to access such opportunities?

Would really appreciate any guidance you can offer.

Thanks a bunch!

entry.title: Which is the new version or alternative of C_GRCAC certification?
entry.content:
Hello SAP learning Community,

My colleague is an SAP Security consultant wants to peruse certification on Security but when checked certificate recommendation via:  SAP Certification Recommendation
==========================
C_GRCAC SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP Access Control 12.0 Already retired* No recommendation*
=================================
The C_GRCAC is retired and there are no recommendations for it.
So, what will be the next path for the Security Consultants in certificate perspective?
Please recommend.

Thanks and regards,
Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: Which is the correct Learning Journey and Certification for Project Managers for SAP S/4HANA, Public
entry.content:
In the below link, if you navigate to Knowledge Requirements > SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition > Role: Project Manager, the Learning Journey and Certification both point to the Implementation Consultant. Is this an error? If yes, can it be fixed so that we know which certification to do for this role?

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/partnership/manage/competency/requirements.html?#section-1-accordion-panel-section-row-item_2-widewidgets-accordionitem_copy_1_1292473518

Furthermore, the "Project Management" link in this page, is broken and does not take you anywhere:

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/s4hanacld/public-edition/about/training-and-education.html 

Thank you

entry.title: Certification: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am wondering why in this Learning Path the "Topic areas" for the certification include "Agile Project Management" and "Agile Project Delivery" but in the Learning journey this topics are not mentioned ?

entry.title: is doing a certification gives the edge to a consultant in the job market
entry.content: is doing a certification gives the edge to a consultant in the job market if one wants to start as a fresher from recruitment profile or just theoritical plus experiential knowledge is enough to get started.

entry.title: How to keep certification valid if changing organization.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I have resigned from the X Org. from which I took certification and kept delta and certification validity.

Since I'm leaving when 1H 2024 has been released, and "Stay Current" is still not available. How would I be able to keep my certifications valid.

entry.title: Digital Badge not received after passing the certification
entry.content:
on 6th May 2024, i completed the certification C_TS4FI_2021. After successfully completing the exam, i received a mail that i have passed the exam. However, i have not received any follow on mail to claim the digital badge, and also when i check certification tab under 'My learnings' section the certificate is not available.

My universal id is tusharpoddar@gmail.com

I have already raised Ticket on same day (Ticket ID 751434) which is lying unattended on 4th day today.

I have raised it of twitter of Learning@SAP but no one seems to be bothered. Is there any other way or escalation method available for this

entry.title: SF Certification Invalid Exam Link
entry.content:
I had a scheduled SF certification exam but when I clicked Begin Exam as per proctor's instructions, the exam didn't load and just showed gray screen all through out. We tried a couple more times and I was even asked to force restart but the exam still didn't load after 30 minutes of back and forth.

I reached out to Examity and was told that the link SAP provided to them is invalid. Has anyone encountered this? Not sure if this is due the fact that 2311 is sunseting hence they are no longer allowing test takers?

I had previously taken other certifications and didn't encounter this issue.

entry.title: SAP HCM certification
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am working as a SAP HCM consultant for quite very few years in India payroll 

I wanted to go for Sap certification but I am not sure which one, Hana,EC.(SF), there are lot many!

I am not sure as a functional consultant  what should I opt for that will help me in future. 

CertificationSAP enhancement package for SAP ERP, version for SAP HANA
